name: Strawberry Refrigerator Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the strawberries and remove any hulls or debris. Slice them into small pieces.
2. Combine the sliced strawberries with sugar and lemon juice in a large bowl.
3. Allow the mixture to macerate overnight, stirring occasionally until all the sugar has dissolved.
4. The following day, bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove the berries from the syrup and transfer them to another container.
6. Cook the syrup in a candy thermometer until it reaches 220 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Return the berries to the hot syrup and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Pour the mixture into a clean plastic container and allow it to cool to room temperature, stirring occasionally.
9. Once cooled, cover the container and refrigerate.
Yield: 3 cups
